classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 该裁剪图为零部件结构尺寸图，能看到键的尺寸标注 25 和 6、'KEY' 标注、键槽标注 M6L18，以及直径和公差标注如 019-0.013、21.5-0.2、35±1、113.7±1.5，属于机械外形与加工尺寸信息。

Corrected OCR '面' to datum identifier A in small datum feature symbol.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Visible mounting/thread callout includes M6L18; local step dimensions 4 and 9 are present but OCR association is low confidence.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Shaft interface includes ⌀19 +0/-0.013, key detail 25 length and 6 width, and key/shaft related dimension 21.5 +0/-0.2.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Envelope dimensions include 35±1, 113.7±1.5, ⌀70 +0/-0.02, and reference overall height (96.5).
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector outlines are shown but no reliable connector text callout was captured in this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Some geometric tolerance symbols and small local dimensions were not fully captured by OCR source boxes; uncertain/noise OCR items were excluded or listed unresolved.

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 图中是电源接口接线表，包含‘引线名称’、‘Pin No’、‘信号定义’三列，并明确给出 1-U、2-V、3-W、4-PE 的针脚与功能对应关系，属于动力连接器针脚定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域仅显示表头文字'连接器型号'和'Connector Models'，在完整图中对应连接器型号栏标题；未包含针脚编号与功能、线色或接线关系，因此最接近机械尺寸类中关于连接器型号信息的范围。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框内是4针连接器正面针位示意，顶部可见针位编号'1 2 3 4'；在完整来源图中该图位于引线定义表的动力线区域，邻近表格给出1-U、2-V、3-W、4-PE的动力接线对应关系，因此属于动力连接器针脚定义。

text_annotations.ambiguity_note: Top row label 1, leftmost of the four digits; box is tight to visible glyph strokes only.
Top row label 2, second digit from the left; box avoids the connector outline below.
Top row label 3, third digit from the left; box is on the glyph, not the adjacent blank area.
Top row label 4, rightmost of the four digits; box is tight to visible glyph strokes only.

drawing_metadata.drawing_content_summary: Power connector face/detail with four visible position labels above the connector.

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve visible source text exactly; do not infer hidden connector specifications from context image.
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: No dimensional unit is visible in IMAGE 1; engineering drawing context suggests mechanical drawing but no unit is assigned to these labels.
language_processing_rules.terminology_rules: Use connector-position terminology for numeric labels; do not classify as dimensions unless a measurable feature is explicitly called out.

ambiguous_terms.note_zh: 仅可确认为连接器上方可见编号；IMAGE 1未显示引脚定义表。
ambiguous_terms.note_en: Visible only as connector position numbers; IMAGE 1 does not show the pin-definition table.

dimension_records.engineering_notes_en: Functional position label only; no pin definition visible in IMAGE 1.
dimension_records.engineering_notes_zh: 仅为功能位置编号；IMAGE 1未显示引脚定义。

dimension_records.engineering_notes_en: Functional position label only; no pin definition visible in IMAGE 1.

dimension_records.engineering_notes_zh: 仅为功能位置编号；IMAGE 1未显示引脚定义。

mounting_interface.zh: IMAGE 1显示连接器安装面/外壳轮廓和角部孔形特征，但无尺寸标注。
mounting_interface.en: IMAGE 1 shows the connector mounting face or housing outline with corner hole-like features, but no dimensional callouts.

shaft_and_key_interface.zh: 该裁剪区域不包含轴或键槽接口信息。
shaft_and_key_interface.en: This crop contains no shaft or keyway interface information.

overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: 目标图未给出总体外形尺寸或间隙尺寸。
overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: No overall envelope or clearance dimensions are provided in the target image.

connector_considerations.zh: 可确认连接器上方有1、2、3、4四个位置编号；具体引脚定义需查阅目标图以外的表格或资料。
connector_considerations.en: Four connector position labels, 1, 2, 3, and 4, are visible above the connector; actual pin definitions require information not visible in the target image.

missing_or_unresolved_data.zh: 缺少连接器型号、引脚功能、额定参数、尺寸、公差和单位。
missing_or_unresolved_data.en: Connector model, pin functions, ratings, dimensions, tolerances, and units are not visible in IMAGE 1.

unresolved_items.note_zh: IMAGE 1仅显示编号1至4，未显示对应电气定义。
unresolved_items.note_en: IMAGE 1 shows labels 1 through 4 only; corresponding electrical pin definitions are not visible.

unresolved_items.note_zh: 目标裁剪图未显示连接器型号或料号文字。
unresolved_items.note_en: No connector model or part-number text is visible in the target crop.

unresolved_items.note_zh: 目标裁剪图未显示尺寸、单位或公差。
unresolved_items.note_en: No dimensions, units, or tolerances are visible in the target crop.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框在完整图左下连接器表格的反馈线区域，裁剪图显示'反馈线 Feedback'以及针脚编号1至7与'DC +5V'、'GND'、'VB+'、'VB-'、'SD+'、'SD-'、'Shield'等反馈信号功能对应关系，属于反馈连接器针脚定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为下方'Feedback'区域中的连接器针位示意，图内可见针脚编号'1'、'2'、'3'、'4'、'5'、'7'，结合完整源图左侧相邻反馈线表格可知这些编号对应'DC +5V'、'GND'、'VB+'、'VB-'、'SD+'、'SD-'、'Shield'等反馈信号定义，因此属于反馈连接器针脚定义。

unresolved_items.issue: Additional visible connector labels appear in the crop but have no corresponding OCR source_id, so they were not extracted or assigned coordinates.

terminology_notes: This crop is a torque-speed performance graph rather than a mechanical dimension view.
RPM is preserved as the speed axis label; torque unit is not visible in the OCR-supported crop.

dimension_records.reason: Vertical axis label identifies the plotted torque parameter.
Horizontal axis label identifies speed in RPM.
Text label inside the upper graph region names the short-term operating area.
Text label inside the lower graph region names the continuous operating area.
Coordinate callout labels the upper torque-speed curve point.
Coordinate callout labels the lower continuous torque-speed curve point.
Right-end coordinate callout marks both curves converging at 5000 RPM and zero torque; OCR punctuation required correction.
These source texts are bottom-axis tick labels.
